name: Frozen Citrus Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the lemonade concentrate into a large mixing bowl.
2. Beat for about 30 seconds until smooth.
3. Gradually add in the softened vanilla ice cream and blend thoroughly.
4. Fold in the thawed whipped topping and add yellow food coloring (if using). Continue blending until the mixture is completely smooth.
5. If necessary, freeze the mixture until it will mound when placed into the pie crust.
6. Spoon the filling into the prepared Ready Graham cracker crust.
7. Freeze for at least 4 hours to set.
8. Store any leftover pie in the freezer.
